vocab.example: What fascinates me most is the multidisciplinary approach of my course, blending elements of psychology, sociology, and economics.

vocab.meaning: sự ham học hỏi/tò mò về trí tuệ
vocab.example: My studies constantly pique my intellectual curiosity, leading me to explore topics far beyond the core syllabus.

vocab.meaning: kinh nghiệm thực hành thực tế
vocab.example: The most compelling aspect is gaining hands-on experience in the laboratory, where we apply complex formulas to real-world chemical reactions.

vocab.meaning: sự hiểu biết thấu đáo và tinh tế (đa chiều)
vocab.example: Studying literature has given me a more nuanced understanding of human emotions and the subtle intricacies of language.

vocab.meaning: sự khắt khe/nghiêm ngặt trong học thuật
vocab.example: I find the academic rigor of this program incredibly rewarding, as it pushes me to achieve a higher standard of critical analysis.

vocab.meaning: nghiên cứu mang tính đột phá
vocab.example: It is thrilling to be involved in groundbreaking research that could potentially change the way we approach renewable energy.
The innovative pedagogical methods used by my professors make even the most dry and abstract subjects come to life.

vocab.meaning: khung khái niệm/hệ thống tư tưởng
vocab.example: Learning to build a solid conceptual framework for my projects has been the most transformative part of my academic journey.

vocab.meaning: kích thích tư duy phản biện
vocab.example: The seminars are designed to stimulate critical thinking, encouraging us to challenge established norms and viewpoints.

vocab.meaning: rút ngắn khoảng cách (giữa lý thuyết và thực hành)
vocab.example: I love how my studies bridge the gap between abstract mathematical theories and their everyday applications in engineering.
